component.name: pohoda-realpad
component.summary: Integration tool for Pohoda and Realpad systems

description.p: Pohoda-Realpad synchronizes bank movements and payments between the Pohoda accounting system and the Realpad CRM system. It fetches bank records with a variable symbol from Pohoda mServer and posts them to the Realpad API.

ul.li: Integrates with Realpad API for seamless data exchange
Outputs a structured JSON report compatible with MultiFlexi
